hero.title: Turn Your CV Library Into a
hero.subtitle: Extract, structure, and analyze resumes at scale. Build perfect candidate matches using your own custom scoring rules, and interrogate your entire database via conversational AI. Zero manual data entry.

splitScreen.queryText: How many senior developers turned project managers with fintech experience speaking English and French do we have?

dashboardPreview.label: Platform Preview
dashboardPreview.title: Your Entire Talent Pool, Visualized.
dashboardPreview.subtitle: The Qorva AI dashboard gives you an instant command center view of your candidate database — skills distribution, seniority clusters, top profiles, and pipeline health at a glance.
dashboardPreview.matchReportTitle: Ranked Shortlists with Full Scoring Transparency.
dashboardPreview.matchReportSubtitle: Every match report breaks down candidate fit across your custom criteria — mandatory skills, seniority, environment fit — so your team always knows exactly why someone ranked where they did.

featureShowcase.label: In Action
featureShowcase.title: See Qorva AI at Work.
featureShowcase.subtitle: From bulk CV upload to ranked shortlist — three views that show exactly how Qorva AI turns raw resumes into actionable talent intelligence.

feature1.caption: Skills Distribution Analysis
feature1.query: Break down skills distribution of our machine learning engineers pool
feature1.description: Know exactly what skills you have before any client conversation. Qorva AI scans your entire pool and returns a ranked skills breakdown with candidate counts and coverage percentages — so you can pitch staffing capabilities with data, not guesswork.

feature2.caption: AI-Powered Candidate Ranking
feature2.query: Show me machine learning engineers turned project managers with fintech experience and speaking English and French
feature2.description: Combine seniority, career transitions, domain expertise, and language requirements in a single sentence. Qorva AI searches your entire database instantly and returns a ranked shortlist with match scores and clickable candidate profiles — no filters, no Boolean syntax.

feature3.caption: Multi-Dimensional Talent Clustering
feature3.query: Break down seniority distribution in our machine learning engineers pool
feature3.description: Understand your pool's seniority mix, skill depth profiles, leadership styles, and learning velocity at a glance. Four critical talent dimensions visualized in one structured view — so you always know the real strength of your bench before going to market.

feature4.caption: Head-to-Head Candidate Comparison
feature4.query: Which one between candidates referenced by REF-001 and REF-002 is better suited for a senior machine learning engineer position?
feature4.description: Stop second-guessing shortlist decisions. Ask Qorva AI to compare any two candidates directly — it evaluates differentiating skills, seniority, certifications, and role alignment across multiple dimensions, then tells you exactly who is better suited and why. Walk into every client debrief with a clear, defensible recommendation.

problem.title: Your ATS stores candidates. Qorva AI helps you monetize them.
problem.subtitle: You've spent years and thousands of dollars building a candidate database, but most of its value is invisible. Standard keyword searches are too rigid, and manual screening eats hours of recruiter productivity.

item1.title: The "Black Hole" Database
item1.description: Great candidates are forgotten the moment a role closes. Your best talent is invisible inside a database you've already paid to build.

item2.title: Messy, Inconsistent Formats
item2.description: Unstructured resumes make objective comparison impossible. Every review becomes a subjective, time-consuming guessing game.

item3.title: Data Pollution
item3.description: Duplicates and outdated files clutter search results, wasting recruiter time and distorting your talent intelligence.

item4.title: Subjective Matching
item4.description: Recruiters rely on memory or flawed keyword matching, missing non-obvious fits and consistently overlooking top talent.

workflow.title: From Raw Resumes to Ranked Shortlists in 4 Simple Steps.
workflow.subtitle: No training required. No complex setup. Just upload your CVs and let Qorva AI do the intelligence work.

upload.label: Step 1
upload.title: Bulk Upload
upload.description: Drop up to 100 CVs at once in any format — PDF, Word, or plain text.

enrich.label: Step 2
enrich.title: Enrich & Graph
enrich.description: Qorva extracts deep candidate metrics: Velocity, Seniority, Environment Fit, Clusters, and more.

interrogate.label: Step 3
interrogate.title: Ask & Interrogate
interrogate.description: Query your entire database using natural language, exactly like a human headhunter would.

score.label: Step 4
score.title: Score & Export
score.description: Rank candidates with your custom scoring rules and export clean, structured shortlists instantly.

pillars.title: Six Intelligence Layers. One Unified Platform.
pillars.subtitle: Qorva AI builds a multi-dimensional talent graph out of your existing data — delivering precision matching and insights you can't get from flat keyword searches.

a.label: Deep Resume Intelligence
a.title: Standardize and enrich every CV automatically.
a.description: Drop up to 100 CVs at once. Qorva automatically flags duplicates, normalizes layouts, and derives advanced candidate data points across 8 dimensions.
a.points: Primary & Secondary Clusters · Skills Depth · Seniority Level · Leadership Potential · Learning Velocity · Functional Expertise · Industry Domains · Environment Fit

b.label: Strategic Talent Dashboard
b.title: See your talent pool like a business asset.
b.description: Gain instant high-level visibility into your entire database. Spot top skills, talent clusters, geographical density, and candidate readiness so your team can confidently pitch staffing capabilities to clients.

c.label: Custom-Rule Matching
c.title: Generate shortlists based on your hiring priorities.
c.description: Mark skills as Mandatory, Important, or Nice-to-Have and define custom scoring weights. Qorva outputs a ranked Matching Report with explicit breakdowns of strengths, gaps, and overall alignment.

d.label: Conversational AI
d.title: Speak directly to your candidate database.
d.description: Skip the filters. Use natural language to perform complex talent logic instantly across 8 specialized intent categories.
d.intentHeader2: What You Can Ask Qorva AI

talent.example: "Are we ready to staff a new banking client in Brussels?"

gap.example: "Which critical skills are missing in our cybersecurity pool?"

ranking.example: "Who are our top 10 candidates for a senior DevOps role?"

rediscovery.example: "Find candidates we rejected last year who match this new position."

clustering.example: "Group our active technical candidates into engineering specializations."

skills.example: "What are the most common tech stacks in our aerospace pool?"

comparison.example: "Compare REF-001 and REF-002 on leadership and environment fit."

rules.example: "What are good technical interview questions for a backend engineer?"

e.label: AI Resume Chat
e.title: Never conduct an unprepared interview again.
e.description: Access AI Resume Chat directly from the main menu to deep-dive into any candidate's background. Ask targeted questions in natural language, surface career edge cases, challenge technical gaps, and generate tailored, high-impact interview questions — before you ever sit down for the interview.

f.label: ATS Export
f.title: Fits seamlessly into your existing workflow.
f.description: Qorva doesn't force you to rip and replace your current software stack. Instantly export your top-ranked shortlists in standard CSV format to sync directly with your favorite ATS.

trust.title: Transparent, Recruiter-Controlled AI Workflows.
trust.subtitle: Qorva AI acts as an augmented intelligence engine, not a black box decision-maker. Designed around transparency and human-in-the-loop validation.

explainability.title: Total Explainability
explainability.description: Every match ranking is backed by clear, auditable reasoning based on your own scoring rules — no mystery scores, no opaque algorithms.

control.title: Recruiters Rule
control.description: The system recommends; humans make the final hiring decisions. Full control stays with your team at every step of the workflow.

integrity.title: Data Integrity
integrity.description: All candidate data is logically segregated by organization using strict access controls, ensuring your talent data stays private and visible only to authorized members of your team.

gdpr.title: Compliance Certified
gdpr.description: Fully compliant with GDPR, CCPA, and the EU AI Act. Built with privacy-by-design principles and transparent, auditable data processing flows to meet today's recruitment compliance standards.

finalCta.title: Stop sourcing from scratch.
finalCta.titleAccent: Unlock your hidden talent network today.
finalCta.subtitle: Get full, unrestricted access to Qorva AI for 7 days. Upload your first batch of resumes, query your data, and generate ranked shortlists in minutes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

item1.question: Do I need an ATS or HR software to use Qorva AI?
item1.answer: No. Qorva AI is a standalone platform built for recruiting teams that want intelligence beyond their ATS. Just create an account, upload your resumes and job description, and you'll have a ranked shortlist in minutes — no integrations or IT setup needed.

item2.question: How quickly can I start screening candidates?
item2.answer: Immediately. Sign up, upload your resumes, and Qorva AI starts processing candidates right away. Most users have a ranked shortlist ready within minutes of their first login.

item3.question: Is Qorva AI only for high-volume hiring?
item3.answer: Not at all. Whether you're managing 50 candidates or 5,000, Qorva AI turns your existing database into an active, searchable asset. It's designed for teams that want to make fast, confident placement decisions.

item4.question: Can I define what matters most for each specific role?
item4.answer: Yes. You define the scoring rules — required skills, seniority level, experience domains — and Qorva AI ranks every candidate accordingly. Each score comes with a clear explanation so you always know why someone ranked where they did.

item5.question: Is candidate data secure and GDPR compliant?
item5.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Qorva AI is GDPR-compliant — candidate data is never sold or shared with third parties, processed in isolated tenant spaces, and can be deleted at any time on request.

item6.question: Is there a free trial?
item6.answer: Yes — 7 days, full access. Upload real candidates for a real role and see exactly what Qorva AI can do before you commit to any plan.
